# zstack_vm_cdrom (Resource)

Manages a VM CD-ROM in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the VM CD-ROM.
- `vm_instance_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VM instance.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the VM CD-ROM.
- `iso_uuid` (String) The UUID of the ISO image.

### Read-Only

- `device_id` (Number) The device ID of the CD-ROM.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the VM CD-ROM.
